title: 关系图谱信息图
description: Please generate a high-design character relationship map poster based on {argument name="theme" default="Demon Slayer"}. This image should not be a simple illustration, but a character relationship map that combines info
prompt_raw:
Please generate a high-design character relationship map poster based on Demon Slayer. This image should not be a simple illustration, but a character relationship map that combines information visualization, narrative structure, poster design sense, and stylistic fidelity.

Please automatically complete the following:
- Identify the work and core settings corresponding to the theme
- Extract the most representative 6–12 key characters, not exceeding 15 if necessary
- Identify and display key character relationships, including blood ties, romance, friendship, alliances, hostility, master-disciple, etc.
- Automatically choose a composition method based on the work's characteristics, such as protagonist-centered, dual-core confrontation, faction-based, family tree, or chronological evolution
- Automatically refine the work's style DNA, including color, worldview symbols, textures, mood, typography, and representative elements
- Transform these stylistic elements into an overall visual design for the relationship map, rather than simply copying an official poster
- Use different colors, line types, and arrows to distinguish different relationships, ensuring clear lines and layers without clutter
- Make core characters most prominent, followed by important characters, and subordinate characters weakened to form a clear visual hierarchy
- Ensure every character name is legible, with identity or faction labels if necessary

The final product should satisfy:
- Immediate understanding of character hierarchy and key relationships
- Obvious alignment with the original work's temperament and setting
- Combines the clarity of an infographic with the premium design of a poster
- Unified, exquisite, complete, and suitable for social media sharing or poster display
- Avoids a cheap flowchart feel, messy piling, and information overload.
prompt_preview: Please generate a high-design character relationship map poster based on {argument name="theme" default="Demon Slayer"}. This image should not be a simple illustration, but a character relationship map that combines info
prompt_display_cn:
案例「theme」属于信息图/结构图。这是一张信息图/结构图类案例，重点不是单一画面主体，而是把主题内容拆成清晰模块，用标题、图标、箭头、分区、编号、标签和说明文字组织信息。适合改成知识科普、人物关系、流程图、城市地图、产品说明、攻略指南等高信息密度视觉。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：Please generate a high-design 角色 relationship 地图 海报 based on 【theme：Demon Slayer】. This image should not be a simple 插画, but a 角色 relationship 地图 that combines information visualization, narrative structure, 海报 design sense, and stylistic fidelity. Please automatically complete the following: - Identify the work and core settings corresponding to the theme - Extract the most representative 6–12 key 角色s, not exceeding 15 if necessary - Identify and display key 角色 relationships, including blood ties, romance, friendship, alliances, hostility, master-disciple, etc. - Automatically choose a composition method based on the work's 角色istics, such as protagonist-centered, dual-core confrontation, faction-based, family tree, or chronological evolution - Automatically refine the work's 风格 DNA, including color, worldview symbols, textures, mood, 字体排版, and representative elements - Transform these stylistic elements into an overall visual design for the relationship 地图, rather than simply copying
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的信息图/结构图。

画面定位：
面向【目标读者】，用于【使用场景】，整体要求信息清楚、层级明确、视觉有吸引力。

主体内容：
以【核心对象/中心主题】为视觉中心，周围分成【模块数量】个信息模块，分别展示【模块1】、【模块2】、【模块3】、【模块4】等内容。

版式结构：
采用【版式结构】，使用清晰的标题区、分区框、箭头连线、编号标签、图标和简短说明文字组织信息。重要内容要突出，次要内容保持整齐。

视觉风格：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，背景为【背景样式】，配色使用【主色调】，图形元素保持统一。

文字要求：
所有需要显示的文字使用【文字语言】，标题和标签清晰可读，避免乱码、错字和过度拥挤。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布渠道/用途】。
variables_json: [{"key":"field_1","label":"主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_2","label":"目标读者","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入目标读者","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_3","label":"使用场景","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入使用场景","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_4","label":"核心对象/中心主题","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入核心对象/中心主题","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_5","label":"模块数量","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块数量","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"1","label":"模块1","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块1","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"2","label":"模块2","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块2","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"3","label":"模块3","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块3","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"4","label":"模块4","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入模块4","required":true,"type":"long_text"},{"key":"field_10","label":"版式结构","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入版式结构","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_11","label":"视觉风格","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入视觉风格","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_12","label":"背景样式","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入背景样式","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_13","label":"主色调","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入主色调","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_14","label":"文字语言","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入文字语言","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_15","label":"画面比例","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入画面比例","required":true,"type":"text"},{"key":"field_16","label":"发布渠道/用途","default_value":"","placeholder":"请输入发布渠道/用途","required":true,"type":"text"}]
